discrepancies.summary: Dual-witness designation: 126 runbook §2 Step 6 marks dual-witness as OPTIONAL; this 129 runbook §2 Step 6 marks dual-witness as RECOMMENDED for M8b specifically due to closure-type novelty (NUMERICAL-FORECLOSURE-by-residual-acceptance + d>=3 caveat carry-forward; UF-128-3 flag).
